lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Did ye see yon Guard Capt'n 'bout hand?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not at the moment, but I will be seeing him soon.

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Eeee, wha' shall I do! I'll mos' certainly lose tha job...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lose your job? What's wrong, why?

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: I w-w-work... over yon sand pit... and weeell... I found... this... hand! T'were buried in't Sand!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, you found a hand in the sand - that's nice for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Eww a hand, in the sand! Why haven't you told the authorities?

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: They's no' wha' they once was. Tha cap'ain o'the Guard spends near all o'the time drunk in yon pub.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh? The Guard Captain is drunk in the pub you say? That's not good, what will you do?

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Weeellll... do yer think yer could 'elp me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, I'll give you a hand.

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: ..... Nae, ye can 'ave the 'and as h'evidence.

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: P'raps tha smell will get t'Guard Cap'ain's nose out o'his beer fer 2 seconds!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want no part in this!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sir? I have some more beer for you...

lines.speaker: Guard Captain
lines.text: Ahh... jus' wha' I need, now, wha' did you wanna know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've come to report that Bert, the sandman, found a hand in the sand pit.

lines.speaker: Guard Captain
lines.text: Lucky for him, means he can get even more work done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But aren't you going to find out who it ... belonged to?

lines.speaker: Guard Captain
lines.text: Oops, No 'arm done. S'prob'ly a wizard, i's always the wizards fault, go ask them, jus' ring the bell outshide the guild and talk to the first pointy hatted ninny you shee!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err... ok, I'll go ring the bell and talk to a wizard then.

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Did ye see yon Guard Capt'n 'bout hand?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, the Guard Captain said to see the wizards in the guild.

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: So why you hangin' abou' 'ere then? Go ring t'bell at t'mage guild just over yonder!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It seems to have slipped through my fingers!

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Tha's no' surprisin' with yer bag so full, come back when s'not.

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Thank t'gods! I tho' I was bein invaded by undead 'ands from t'sand when I found this'un! Take i' to tha mage guild and ring tha' bell to talk ta someone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks Bert, I'm off to see the wizards, the wonderful wizards of Yanille!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not at the moment.

sections.title: Reclaiming the beer soaked hand from the captain

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Sir!

lines.speaker: Guard Captain
lines.text: Go 'way! This pint'sh nearly finished! Unlessh you got more that ish....? Wizards, s'all the wizard's fault...prob'ly that Zavistic one, he'sh the worsht!

lines.speaker: Guard Captain
lines.text: E're, you left this 'and in me beer!

lines.speaker: Guard Captain
lines.text: No good if you don' have space fer it in yer invent'ry, come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Guard Captain
lines.text: Need more beer...

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: What are you doing bothering me? Don't you think some of us have work to do?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought you were here to help?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Well... I am, I suppose, anyway... we're very busy here, hurry up, what do you want?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Did you find out who killed Clarence yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet, but don't lose your head over it.

lines.speaker: Guard Captain
lines.text: I don' need a hand drinkin me beer, go 'way!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But...

lines.speaker: Guard Captain
lines.text: Talk to tha' hand coz thish face ain't lishtnin'!

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: What are you doing...Oh, it's you...sorry...didn't realise...what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: What are you doing ringing that bell?! Don't you think some of us have work to do?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I was told to ring the bell if I wanted some attention.

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Well...anyway...we're very busy here, hurry up what do you want?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: What are you doing bothering me? Don't you think some of us have work to do?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought you were here to help?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Well... I am, I suppose, anyway... we're very busy here, hurry up, what do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ummm... Do you have all your wizards?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: All my.... whatever do you mean...?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Guard Captain asked me to see if you have any... missing... wizards.

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: That's silly! No one would kill a wizard... would they?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm... no...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well.. maybe, you see Bert found this hand and it might belong to.. a wizard!

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Bert? Ahh yes, the sandman who seems to have been working very long hours recently. Let's see that hand...

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Oh my! This is most definitely Clarence, my most able student! You must find out who did this!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any input as to the matter at hand?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Well.... Ask Bert about the long hours he's been working, that sounds suspicious to me. Digging things up at all hours of the day isn't natural.

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Ey'up [player name]. Did yer see Sandy in Brimhaven 'bout me rota?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err, no, I kind of... lost it...

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Lucky fer yorn tha' I's made a copy then ain't it, I's 'ave been given it to yer iffen you 'ad some space in yer invent'ry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did you say?

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Is you stupid? I said I'd give ye another but yer bags be full!

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Lucky fer yorn tha' I's made a copy then ain't it, 'ere 'ave another.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'll fit it in my schedule somewhere soon.

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Wha' info ye find 'bout hand, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I dug up quite a lot about the hand. Can you tell me about your job?

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Sand! Lots o' sand! Me boss be Sandy o' Sandy's Sand Corp based in Brimhaven on tha isle of Karamja an' I hauls sand fr' there to yon sand pit.

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: I's looong harrrrd hours, bu' keeps me busy, y'know what tha say! 'Idle hands'r Zamorak's tools.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're employed by Sandy's Sand Corp in Brimhaven. Have you changed your hours recently?

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Yer coul' see fer yerself iffen yer had space in yorn invent'ry, come back when yer do.

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Nae! See fer yersel', here's a copy o' me rota tha' be held a' head office - yer can looksee iffin ye talk t' Sandy, me boss.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the Rota Bert. I'll go check for the original with Sandy in Brimhaven.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Sir, do you run the Sand Corp?

lines.speaker: Sandy
lines.text: Who wants to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm [player name]. I'm here investigating the possible murder of a wizard.

lines.speaker: Sandy
lines.text: I don't care about that, I have far too much work to do. Let the authorities take care of things like murder and stop snooping around my office!

sections.title: Talking to Sandy with Sandy's rota in the inventory
Returning to Bert with his original rota

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: I be hopin' tha search is goin' well... are tha wizard's owning up ta anythin' yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've found out a lot and will let you know when it's all over.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I managed to get a copy of the original rota. Your hours changed a week ago!

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: Nae! Nae! I din't remember tha', bu'... hmmm, aye... tha' migh' be it...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? Give me a hand here, I'm having a hard time understanding how you don't remember changing hours!

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: I's all be tha wizard's fault! Tha magic leaks fr'm yon magic guild I tells yer! Tha's why this weirrrrd scroll appeareded a week ago!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A scroll appeared? Can I take a look at it while you look at the rotas?

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: O'course [player name], le's be 'avin'yon rota and 'ere be tha scroll, yer be takin' it back ta those inferrrnal wizards quick sharp!

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: What are you doing...Oh, it's you...sorry...didn't realise...what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost my magical scrying orb!

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: I'd give you another magical scrying orb if you had some space in your inventory.

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: No matter, here, have another and please hurry, whoever killed Clarence must pay!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you help me more?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Bring me a vial and I'll help you a little more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a vial here for you.

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Ok, would you like me to transport you to Port Sarim? I'm sticking my neck out a bit helping you like this and can only do it once though!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, that would be great!

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Off you go then, break a leg!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I prefer using my legs, thanks all the same.

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Ok, suit yourself!

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: What are you doing...Oh, it's you...sorry...didn't realise...what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I talked to Bert and found something very strange about his hours.

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Oh? Did he kill Clarence?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, but he doesn't remember changing his hours, and his rota and the original that his boss Sandy had, are different!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ... oh, and this scroll appeared when they changed - he gave it to me.

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: I recognise that type of scroll! It's used in a mind altering spell of some sort. Did you speak to this... Sandy guy? Perhaps he has a hand in this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I took a look around his office. I don't know about a hand in it, I think he has both hands and feet in it!

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Even more suspicious! Here, take this magical scrying orb and get some Truth Serum from Betty in Port Sarim, she owes me a favour, just tell her I sent you if she complains.

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Then you will be equipped to ask Sandy a few questions. Oh Clarence, I will find your murderer!

sections.title: Talking to Betty without the rose tinted lens

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Hello deary! Have you managed to make that lens yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still working on it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid I've forgotten how!

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Pink dye can be made from red berries in the bottle I gave you. Add white berries to make the pink dye and then you just need to use that on a bullseye lens. Good luck!

sections.title: Talking to Betty with the lens

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Wonderful deary. When you're ready, just stand in the open doorway and focus the light on the empty vial on my desk and I'll pour the serum into it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, what does that do?

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Why it makes the person who drinks it unable to hide in the shadow of lies. The light of truth will shine!

sections.title: Using the lens on the counter

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Ok, now the last ingredient, something personal from the person you need to tell the truth, else it won't work!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll see if I can find something.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about this sand straight from his pocket?

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: That's excellent deary!

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Don't forget to dilute it in something like tea or coffee.

sections.title: Trying to put the sand in the truth serum yourself

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Hello deary! How did the serum work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost it!

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: That's not a problem, I kept some of it here just in case, but you have no space for it! Come back when you do

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: That's not a problem, I kept some of it here just in case, here you are!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't tried it yet.

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Well don't forget to dilute it in a drink or something else bad things might happen.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bad things?

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Well.... bits might drop off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh! I... see. I'll remember to dilute it then.

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: What are you doing...Oh, it's you...sorry...didn't realise...what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Have you made the serum and talked to Sandy yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet, but don't bust a gut over it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've come from Yanille, the wizard says you can make Truth Serum?

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: This is true deary, I'll need an empty vial.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll have to go find one then, I'll be back!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have one here!

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: That's good, now you'll need to make a rose tinted lens. Pink dye can be made from red berries in this bottle to make redberry juice, then add white berries. Just use that on a bullseye lens.

sections.title: Attempting to pour the truth serum inside Sandy's Coffee Mug

lines.speaker: Sandy
lines.text: I don't have time to talk to you. Go away!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There's a herd of huge mutant herring about to drop from the sky!

lines.speaker: Sandy
lines.text: Wow! I must see this!

lines.speaker: Sandy
lines.text: I'm not falling for that one!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But the pygmy shrews have eaten all the sand!

lines.speaker: Sandy
lines.text: Wow! I must see this!

lines.speaker: Sandy
lines.text: I'm not falling for that one!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A small parrot with a pink banana is sitting outside your window!

lines.speaker: Sandy
lines.text: Wow! I must see this!

lines.speaker: Sandy
lines.text: I'm not falling for that one!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now, I'm going to ask you some questions and I want you to answer me truthfully...

lines.speaker: Sandy
lines.text: Ok...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why is Bert's rota different from the original?

lines.speaker: Sandy
lines.text: Because... I changed it.

lines.speaker: Sandy
lines.text: Because.... because.... I bribed a wizard to put a spell on him so he would believe everything I say!!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Sandy
lines.text: So that I could make him work longer without paying him more!

lines.speaker: Sandy
lines.text: I...I... I KILLED HIM! So I wouldn't have to pay him and no one would know. I put his body in the next load of sand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I have enough evidence now, you can go for now, but I think you're up to your neck in it!

lines.speaker: Sandy
lines.text: I don't have time to talk to you. Go away!

lines.speaker: Betty
lines.text: Hello again deary. Come back and tell me what happened when all the fuss is over.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok Betty, I'll be back!

sections.title: Returning back to Zavistic with the magical orb

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: What are you doing...Oh, it's you...sorry...didn't realise...what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: You really mean you forgot? Bring me 5 earth runes and 1 bucket of sand to help stop that moneygrabbing Sandy!

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: What are you doing...Oh, it's you...sorry...didn't realise...what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've brought what you wanted, what are you going to do?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Ahh excellent, let's have those! Watch and learn...

lines.speaker: Bert
lines.text: My sand! My lovely sand!

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: There, the sand pit will now magically refill. No more work for Bert!

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: We must find the rest of Clarence, I've sent some wizards out to some of the sandpits, would you please check the Entrana sandpit?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: What are you doing...Oh, it's you...sorry...didn't realise...what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I got the whole story from Sandy... but I lost the orb.

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: It's ok, I saw the whole thing as the orb is connected via magic to me as I enchanted it.

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: I think this Sandy needs a lesson, please bring me 5 earth runes and a bucket of sand.

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Well, well...I think this Sandy needs a lesson, please bring me 5 earth runes and a bucket of sand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm, why?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Don't question me or you'll end up as braindead as that legless Guard Captain!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Umm.. ok, I'll get you the 5 earth runes and bucket of sand.

sections.title: Talking to Mazion with the head

lines.speaker: Mazion
lines.text: I see you still have that head! Take it back to the Wizards in Yanille!

lines.speaker: Mazion
lines.text: Hello again [player name]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What should I do with the head?

lines.speaker: Mazion
lines.text: It was you that came demanding the head to give to the wizard in the first place! Go back to Yanille with it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost my head!

lines.speaker: Mazion
lines.text: You dropped it and you don't have room to carry it now, come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Mazion
lines.text: Keep your hair on! You dropped it! Make sure you take it straight back to the wizards else you won't have a leg to stand on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there!

lines.speaker: Mazion
lines.text: Uh...greetings [player name]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uhh... How do you know my name?

lines.speaker: Mazion
lines.text: Oh, I like to keep ahead of things.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err.. ok. Well, I've been sent from the Wizards' Guild in Yanille. There's been an... incident... Do you have any body parts?

lines.speaker: Mazion
lines.text: How did you know! I found the most awful thing in my sandpit - a head!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ahhh good! I need to take it back to be buried!

lines.speaker: Mazion
lines.text: You're very strange, but if it means I get rid of the horrid thing...

lines.speaker: Mazion
lines.text: Or I would if you had any room in your bag!

sections.title: If the player has not checked the Entrana sandpit

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: What are you doing...Oh, it's you...sorry...didn't realise...what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Did you visit the Entrana sandpit yet? Ask the worker there if he's found an arm or a leg.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet no. I've been running around like a headless chicken, but I'll get to it!

sections.title: If the player has checked the Entrana sandpit

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: What are you doing...Oh, it's you...sorry...didn't realise...what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Alas poor Clarence. I knew him, [player name].

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Thank you - we shall bury him today. I have sent word for the guards to arrest Sandy, so no one will ever see him again!
